name: pisignage
description: PiSignage - Digital Signage for Raspberry Pi with Chromium Kiosk + HTML5 Video Player

scripts.lint: echo 'Linting JavaScript files...' && eslint web/assets/js/**/*.js || echo 'ESLint not installed, skipping'
scripts.lint:php: echo 'PHP linting...' && find web -name '*.php' -exec php -l {} \; | grep -v 'No syntax errors'
scripts.format: echo 'Format check (Prettier)...' && prettier --check 'web/assets/js/**/*.js' || echo 'Prettier not installed, skipping'
scripts.dev: echo 'Start PHP development server' && php -S 0.0.0.0:8080 -t web

author: PiSignage Team
